topic: Every face in my phone's camera roll is being scratched out, one photo per day.
title: Every Face In My Camera Roll Is Being Scratched Out | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every face in my camera roll is being scratched out.
scenes.image_prompt: a smartphone lying on a bedside table, screen showing a grid of photo thumbnails, dim lamp light, deep shadow, VHS grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone in a small apartment near the train line.
scenes.image_prompt: a cramped apartment interior at night, window reflecting distant train lights, low light, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I scroll my photos every morning with coffee.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand holding a phone over a coffee mug on a kitchen counter, soft morning haze, muted colors, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One picture of my sister had a thin scratch across her face.
scenes.image_prompt: a close view of a phone screen showing a portrait photo with a single white scratch line, harsh contrast, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I told myself it was a screen glitch.
scenes.image_prompt: fingers pressing against a cracked-looking phone display in dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next day my father's face was gone too, scratched clean.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone screen displaying a family photo with one face obscured by frantic scratch marks, fluorescent buzz, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the backup folder. Same marks there.
scenes.image_prompt: a laptop screen in a dark room showing a cloud photo backup interface, blue glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning, one more face removed. Always someone I loved.
scenes.image_prompt: a wall of printed photographs, several faces blacked out, dim apartment lighting, fog of dust, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Soon only my own photos were left untouched.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone gallery showing a long column of selfies, all intact, surrounded by scratched images, eerie glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning my face was the only one left whole.
scenes.image_prompt: a single selfie glowing on a phone screen in total darkness, every other thumbnail ruined, heavy grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stopped opening the gallery at all now.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone face-down on a duvet in a shadowed bedroom, faint light leaking from its edges, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But each scratch appeared the night before each of them died.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty bed beside a bedside table holding a phone, cold blue night light, deep shadow, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing
